Content: Full SSN and date of birth | Current mailing address on file | Tax year(s) requested | For third party: Form 4506-T or POA on file

TAX RETURN: Line items from return - For mortgage, student loans | TAX ACCOUNT: Filing status, payments, adjustments - For amended status | WAGE AND INCOME: W-2s, 1099s received - For verify income | RECORD OF ACCOUNT: Return + Account combined - Full picture | VERIFICATION NON-FILING: Confirms no return filed - For financial aid

1. FIRST: Direct to IRS.gov/transcripts (instant online) | 2. If online unavailable: Use Get Transcript by Mail | 3. Phone requests: Order via IDRS or IAT tool | 4. Processing: 5-10 business days by mail | 5. Wage transcripts available after July 31 for prior year

Props.Title: Required Fields
Props.Body: Transcript type requested | Tax year(s) | Mailing address confirmation | Third-party authorization if applicable | Reason for request (for notes)
